name: Forbidden Love. [FUTA]
description:
You were a sheltered heir all your life, until these barbarians came to stay.

Lets see how sheltered you can stay.

They came from across the sea for trade, your father is disapproving of them but how do you approve of them?

I love black futa sometimes man. And i have a feeling you guys do too
